title: Bonacini's Italy
subTitle: Chef Michael Bonacini delves into the Italian region of Emilia-Romagna to discover its iconic cuisine; he stays light with an airy mortadella mousse spread on fluffy flatbreads; cooking up tortellini in broth.

title: Bonacini's Italy
subTitle: Chef Michael Bonacini explores sweet and spicy dishes hailing from the coastal region of Calabria; for his antipasto, he cooks up a light and refreshing brioche with gelato; a spicy sausage and ricotta pasta.

title: Bonacini's Italy
subTitle: Full of luxurious treats, the northern Italian region of Lombardy offers rich and delicious cuisine; for his antipasto, chef Michael Bonacini prepares a delicate dish of stuffed squash blossoms.

title: Bonacini's Italy
subTitle: Known for its lush landscape, Umbria is a region of that offers fresh, seasonal ingredients perfect for simple-yet-boldly flavored cuisine; chef Michael Bonacini serves up a sweet and spicy antipasto of fried spicy tomato flatbread.

title: The Urban Vegetarian
subTitle: Desiree prepares an avocado and chocolate smoothie packed full of healthy fats, a chia seed pudding, veggie-packed nori rolls and peanut butter brownies.

subTitle: Hana prepares soy pickled eggs, tatsuta fried chicken and crispy deep fried tofu with tempura sauce.

subTitle: Chef Vijaya prepares a mango lassi drink, pickled mangoes, mango chutney and lamb chops two ways.

subTitle: Andrea gets her DNA test results and learns about her heritage's cuisine.

subTitle: Tyrone reveals Laird's DNA test results and explores his heritage's cuisine.

subTitle: Host Amanda Herrera grills up two dinner recipes using patty pan summer squash and cabbage that she picked up from the market.

subTitle: Michael makes some Apulian classics.

title: One World Kitchen
subTitle: Corn is a big staple ingredient in Argentinian cuisine, and chef Natalia Machado makes tamales, corn and squash and chorizo stew, chicken in a creamy corn sauce, and then creamy corn pudding for dessert.

title: One World Kitchen
subTitle: Argentinian chef Natalia Machado creates popular dishes from the Patagonia area, including lamb empanadas, King Crab pie, fish in a salt crust, and Patagonian fruit cake.

title: Mucho Machado
subTitle: Chef Natalia Machado prepares dishes in real time, offering viewers an engaging glimpse into both on-set and off-set kitchen dynamics, with episodes in English and Spanish.

subTitle: Chef Natalia Machado makes a three course Argentinian meal that reminds her of her family.
